summary.en: a plug-in hybrid car that can be charged and run on electricity and gas
summary.zh: 可外接充电、兼用电力与汽油的插电式混合动力车

definition.en: (abbreviation) a plug-in hybrid vehicle: a hybrid car that can be charged from an external power source and can drive using electricity and/or gasoline.
definition.zh: （缩写）插电式混合动力汽车：既能外接电源充电，也可用电力和/或汽油行驶的混合动力车。

examples.en: I’m thinking about buying a PHV because I can charge it at home.
examples.zh: 我在考虑买一辆PHV，因为我可以在家给它充电。

examples.en: PHVs are convenient for short commutes when you can mostly drive on electric power.
examples.zh: 如果通勤距离短、主要用电来开，PHV会很方便。

examples.en: Some cities offer parking or tax benefits for PHVs.
examples.zh: 一些城市会为PHV提供停车或税收优惠。

extraExplanation: 在英语新闻与日常交流中，更常见的缩写是PHEV（plug-in hybrid electric vehicle）。PHV有时也会被理解为同一概念，尤其在特定品牌/地区语境里。
etymology: PHV是“Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle”的首字母缩写。在日本汽车市场和部分车系命名中较常见（例如某些车型名称里会出现PHV）。
